form.formComment: Comes here off a 38-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 10 at this track on March 8 over 1207m, 3.5 len behind Awesome Fantasy with 53.5kg at $2.30. The run before that 6th of 8 at this track on February 5 over 1408m, 12 len behind Twelve Treasures carrying 54.5kg at $17.90. Rates highly and is among the main hopes.
